overall.description: A first-person walk through a misty coastal stilt village in a high-end game engine. The player moves along a wet muddy path between rocky cliffs and wooden stilt houses, encountering a villager NPC walking in the opposite direction. The atmosphere is atmospheric and muted with overcast lighting and mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal marsh approaching stilt village

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet muddy path toward the distant wooden stilt structures

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with layered sedimentary rock formations
tall green grass and reeds growing in the marshy ground
cluster of wooden stilt houses and structures visible in the misty distance
muddy trail with water puddles reflecting the overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide misty coastal marsh with a wet muddy path leading forward. Rocky cliffs rise on the left while distant wooden stilt structures are visible through the haze on the right. The camera moves steadily forward through the tall grass and marsh vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between cliff and stilt houses

events.description: entering the narrow corridor between the rocky cliff face and wooden stilt structures

agents.ego_description: moving through the confined passage alongside the wooden stilt houses on the right

entered.detail: large wooden building on stilts with dark weathered planks and structural beams
thick wooden support pillars holding up the stilt structures
elevated wooden walkway connecting the stilt buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed passage between the rocky cliff on the left and the wooden stilt village on the right. The camera moves past thick wooden support pillars and elevated walkways, with the muddy path winding between the natural rock face and the weathered wooden structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: stilt village waterfront path with NPC encounter

events.description: villager NPC becomes visible walking toward the camera in the distance
camera passes the villager character on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking past the stilt houses and passing a villager walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: villager wearing a flat cap and coat carrying a long wooden pole, walking toward the camera

entered.detail: expansive view of open water and distant coastline opening up ahead
rocky outcroppings and sea stacks visible in the distant mist

segments.scene_description: The path opens slightly to reveal views of the open water ahead as the camera continues alongside the stilt structures. A villager NPC appears walking in the opposite direction and is passed on the left. The scene transitions from the enclosed village corridor to a more open waterfront passage with distant rock formations visible through the mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, misty coastal marsh into the enclosed corridors of a stilt village before opening back up toward the waterfront. It begins by moving steadily forward along a wet muddy path, flanked by rocky cliffs on the left and distant wooden structures veiled in haze. As the camera advances, the environment tightens into a narrow passage where the path winds between the natural rock face and a series of thick wooden support pillars and elevated walkways. The scene then expands as the camera passes a villager walking in the opposite direction, shifting from the confined village corridor toward a more open waterfront. Finally, the view opens to reveal the expanse of the water and distant rock formations emerging through the persistent mist.
